identity.mission: Create a 'Midnight Social' experience that feels like a VIP pass—mysterious, playful, and high-contrast.
core_principles: Fusion: Nightlife Neon x Swiss Precision
Depth: Glassmorphism and Z-Index layering to create physical space
Negative Space: Don't clutter—let the avatars and content breathe

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-white text-black font-bold hover:bg-slate-200 transition-all active:scale-95 shadow-lg shadow-white/10
buttons.brand: rounded-full bg-gradient-to-r from-indigo-600 to-pink-600 text-white font-bold hover:opacity-90 transition-all active:scale-95 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(99,102,241,0.3)]

cards.venue: rounded-3xl bg-slate-900/50 border border-white/5 overflow-hidden hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300 group relative
cards.profile: rounded-2xl bg-white/5 border border-white/5 p-4 flex flex-col gap-3 hover:bg-white/10 transition-all
cards.token: rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-500/20 to-orange-600/20 border border-amber-500/30 p-4 relative overflow-hidden

inputs.default: bg-white/5 border-transparent focus:border-indigo-500 rounded-xl h-12 px-4 text-white placeholder:text-slate-500 transition-all focus:bg-white/10 ring-offset-slate-950

navigation.dock: fixed bottom-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-slate-900/80 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 rounded-full px-6 py-3 flex items-center gap-8 shadow-2xl shadow-black/50 z-50

grid_system.venue_feed: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 p-4 md:p-8

image_assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all UI icons. Use 'filled' variants for active states.

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure all text on dark backgrounds is at least slate-300 or lighter.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text, it hurts readability.
Avoid 'Inter' font. Use 'Outfit' for headings to maintain brand identity.
No complete transparent backgrounds for dropdowns/overlays; use 'bg-slate-900/90' + blur.
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Midnight Social' theme immediately in tailwind.config.js and index.css.
Install the 'Outfit' and 'Syne' fonts in index.html or CSS.
Create a reusable 'Layout' component that includes the floating dock navigation.
Build the 'VenueCard' and 'UserGlanceCard' as core atomic units.
Use the provided image URLs for seeding the database or mocked UI state.
